description: Small deterministic recall golden set for biTurbo V2. Extend this with real user/project cases.

memories.content: Code fact: MCP tool dispatch is handled in src-tauri/src/mcp.rs inside the dispatch function. It routes tools/call requests to memory, project, ingest, stats, bootstrap, and agent handlers.

Decision: Embedding model loading should be lazy. Embedder::new should not load the ONNX model during AppState::open; the model should load on first semantic operation to improve cold start and idle RAM.
Decision: ingest_project should respect .gitignore and also support .biturboignore for biTurbo-specific exclusions. Hard file-size skipping is too blunt because large files can still be relevant.
User preference: prefer concise, direct answers. Avoid long preambles unless depth is explicitly requested.

Bug: remember() previously updated old memories with superseded_by = id, which set the old memory to point to itself instead of the newly inserted memory. Fix by inserting the new row first and then setting old.superseded_by = new_id.
Build issue: tauri::generate_context! fails if frontendDist is ../dist and pnpm build has not created dist. CI should build the frontend before cargo clippy or cargo test.

cases.name: mcp dispatch location
cases.query: where is MCP tool dispatch handled?

cases.name: lazy embedding startup decision
cases.query: what did we decide about lazy loading embeddings and cold start?

cases.name: ignore rules for ingest
cases.query: should ingest skip large files or use biturboignore?

cases.name: user style preference
cases.query: how should I answer the user by default?

cases.name: supersedes linkage bug
cases.query: what was wrong with superseded_by in remember?

cases.name: tauri frontendDist CI failure
cases.query: why does tauri generate_context fail in cargo test?
